title: IBM goes sub-1nm, develops 0.7nm-class technology offering up to 50% higher performance and 70% higher energy efficiency compared to IBM's 2nm-class node
summary: IBM has developed a 0.7nm-class technology with up to 50% higher performance and 70% higher energy efficiency compared to its 2nm-class node, leveraging nanostack transistors.
insight: Advancing transistor design enables unprecedented performance and efficiency gains.

title: Rosewill s M.2 SSD Cloner and Eraser drops to its lowest-ever price of $47 become an IT hero, or just save yourself some time and frustration
summary: Clone and erase NVMe drives with Rosewill's M.2 SSD Cloner and Eraser for $47, a price drop from its previous value. This tool allows for offline or connected PC cloning and erasing of NVMe drives. Save time and reduce frustration with this affordable solution.
insight: Effortlessly manage NVMe drives with a budget-friendly cloning tool.

title: Asus offers up to 36% off its ZenWiFi mesh routers tri-band Wi-Fi 7 mesh routers starting from $297
summary: Asus is offering discounts on its ZenWiFi mesh Wi-Fi 7 routers, starting at $297. Customers can save up to 36% on these tri-band routers. This sale provides a chance to upgrade home networks at a lower cost.
insight: Improve home Wi-Fi coverage with discounted ZenWiFi mesh routers.

title: Nintendo Switch 2 is once again $399 at Woot for new customers, $419 for returning customers with code save up to $50 while supplies last
summary: Woot is offering the Nintendo Switch 2 at a discounted price of $399 for new customers and $419 for returning customers, with the option to save up to $50 using a code while supplies last.
insight: Discounted Nintendo Switch 2 offers significant savings for gamers.

title: Get a Radeon RX 9060 XT 16GB upgrade for just $399 take your pick from four attainable options at Newegg now
summary: Newegg offers four $399 Radeon RX 9060 XT 16GB upgrade options, a rare deal in the current RAM price crunch. This provides an affordable path for those seeking to upgrade their graphics cards with 16GB of RAM. Newegg's options cater to various needs and preferences.
insight: Affordable high-capacity graphics cards are a rare market find now.

title: Microsoft increases Xbox Series console prices for the third time in two years, kills off 2TB model $100-$150 upswings on every model
summary: Microsoft has raised Xbox Series console prices for the third time in two years, increasing the prices of all models except the now-discontinued 2TB model by $100-$150.
insight: Price hikes may impact consumer demand and Xbox sales performance.

title: Epic boss Tim Sweeney blasts Steam for putting AI tags on games says move is irresponsible of Valve
summary: Epic Games' Tim Sweeney criticizes Steam for labeling AI-generated games, calling it irresponsible. He says AI tools increase productivity but the 'AI' label discourages use and harms sales. This could deter developers from using AI tools.
insight: AI label hurts sales, discouraging developers from using AI tools

title: Scalpers circle AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, asking for $600 or more re-released CPU sees inconsistent inventory on release day
summary: Scalpers are trying to capitalize on the Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition, listing it for nearly double its suggested retail price.
insight: Scalpers exploit Anniversary Edition's limited supply and high demand quickly.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D re-review: Maxing out DDR4 s gaming potential
summary: AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D is re-released to capitalize on DDR4 availability. We revisit this CPU to see how it compares to modern DDR4-based gaming options at similar price points. This re-review aims to determine the chip's current value proposition.
insight: Maxing out DDR4 gaming potential remains a viable budget-friendly solution

title: Riot Vanguard finally drops its controversial always-on requirement for anti-cheat new on-demand mode requires a strict Windows 11 security stack
summary: Riot Games is dropping the always-on requirement for Vanguard anti-cheat. The change allows players to opt out of loading Vanguard on startup. A new on-demand mode requires a strict Windows 11 security stack.
insight: Gaming platform prioritizes player choice and system security requirements

title: The AI tokenmaxxing party is crashing over spiraling costs leaked consulting firm audio suggests no one is sure how to measure AI effectiveness
summary: A leaked Accenture meeting recording reveals companies' AI costs are spiraling out of control. Non-technical employees may be encouraged to stop using AI for non-essential tasks. The effectiveness of AI investments is unclear.
insight: Lack of AI effectiveness metrics fuels uncontrolled spending and wastage.

title: Asus beta BIOS updates restore Ryzen 9000 memory encryption ahead of AMD s July timeline TSME returns to select AM5 boards after silent backlash over removal
summary: Asus has released beta BIOS updates to restore TSME support for Ryzen 9000 CPUs on select AM5 motherboards. This update brings back a feature previously removed, ahead of AMD's planned July timeline. The move appears to be a response to user backlash.
insight: AMD's removal sparks user revolt, prompting Asus to restore TSME

title: RAM crisis bites Apple as unprecedented Mac and iPad price rises arrive cheapest MacBook Pro price hiked by $400 to $1,999
summary: Apple has raised prices for all current Mac and iPad models, including a $400 hike to the cheapest MacBook Pro, reaching $1,999. The price increase affects entry-level models, with some rising by as much as $500. This move marks an unprecedented decision for the tech giant.
insight: Apple's price hike may impact affordability and sales momentum.

title: Qualcomm plans China-specific data center chips new Dragonfly lineup will include nerfed AI accelerators that comply with export thresholds
summary: Qualcomm plans to bring its Dragonfly data center chips to China, including a new lineup with AI accelerators compliant with export thresholds.
insight: Qualcomm adapts to China's export control regulations for competitive edge

title: HyperX Cloud Stinger 3 Wireless Headset Review: 80 hours and under $100
summary: The HyperX Cloud Stinger 3 Wireless headset offers 50mm drivers, flip-to-mute mic, and up to 80 hours of battery life at an affordable price under $100.
insight: Affordable long-lasting wireless gaming headset for extended play sessions

title: Micron inks long-term supply agreements worth $100 billion says it has no idea when RAM crisis will end
summary: Micron has signed 16 long-term agreements with customers worth $100 billion, securing DRAM and NAND supply. These agreements are set to provide stability for both Micron and its customers. The exact timing of the RAM crisis resolution remains uncertain.
insight: Uncertainty surrounding the RAM crisis persists despite Micron's supply agreements.

title: Discounted 1.25 GHz Raspberry Pi 4 Model B shows up online
summary: Cytron is selling a discounted Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with 1.25 GHz clock speed, 4GB or 8GB RAM, and microSD card slot. This board features a Broadcom BCM2711C0 quad-core Cortex-A72 processor with VideoCore VI GPU. The Raspberry Pi 4 Model B Special Value Board is available for purchase online.
insight: A lower-cost Raspberry Pi option with reduced performance

title: Makerfabs MaTouch ESP32-P4 10.1-inch HMI display features 4G LTE and Ethernet connectivity, a 2MP camera
summary: The Makerfabs MaTouch ESP32-P4 is a 10.1-inch HMI display with 4G LTE and Ethernet connectivity, a 2MP camera, and various interfaces for edge AI and connected embedded applications.
insight: Combines 4G connectivity with edge AI and HMI capabilities.

title: $449 CHUWI UniBook 14-inch laptop is powered by an Intel Core 3 304 Wildcat Lake processor
summary: CHUWI has launched the UniBook laptop with an Intel Core i3-304 Wildcat Lake processor, 8GB RAM, and a 256GB SSD for $449. This budget-friendly laptop offers an entry-level option for consumers interested in the Wildcat Lake series. The CHUWI UniBook features a 14-inch 1920x1200 IPS display.
insight: Affordable Wildcat Lake laptop option enters the consumer market.

title: Firefly AIBOX-9075 Edge AI box features 200 TOPS Qualcomm IQ-9075 SoC, 36GB LPDDR5, industrial I/Os
summary: The Firefly AIBOX-9075 is an industrial Edge AI box with 200 TOPS performance, designed for on-device AI workloads, edge computing, and more. It features a Qualcomm IQ-9075 SoC, 36GB LPDDR5 memory, and various industrial I/Os. The rugged device operates in extreme temperatures, making it suitable for industrial and outdoor environments.
insight: Enables on-device AI processing for industrial and outdoor applications

title: Orange Pi 6 CIX CD8180 12-core Arm SBC gets 2.5GbE networking, smaller form factor, drops battery support
summary: The Orange Pi 6 SBC features a 12-core Arm Cortex-A720/A520 SoC, up to 32 GB LPDDR5 memory, two 2.5GbE ports, and a smaller form factor than its predecessor.
insight: Improved networking and compact design boost SBC's industrial and IoT applications.

title: IBM unveils sub-1-nanometer chip architecture that stacks 100 billion transistors onto a fingernail-sized processor
summary: IBM has unveiled a sub-1-nanometer chip architecture that stacks 100 billion transistors vertically, overcoming traditional scaling limits.
insight: Revolutionary vertical stacking enables continued transistor density without shrinking components further.

title: Valve quietly changes Steam Machine's 4K/60fps claim after performance criticism
summary: Valve has altered the language on Steam Machines regarding 4K/60fps gaming after criticism, now listing FSR 4.1 support. This change follows criticism of the original hardware and pricing restrictions. The updated listing aims to provide a more accurate representation of capabilities.
insight: Valve adjusts Steam Machine claims due to performance and pricing concerns

title: Windows 10's free security updates now extend to October 2027
summary: Microsoft will continue providing Windows 10 security updates until October 12, 2027. This change extends the support period without a formal announcement. Users have more time to decide on upgrading.
insight: Extended security support gives users extra time to transition smoothly.

title: Game designer Sandy Petersen recalls how Quake's development "broke" id Software
summary: id Software's Quake development significantly impacted the FPS genre in 1996, pushing the boundaries of 3D gaming. The project took a heavy toll on the team, marking a turning point for the studio. Sandy Petersen, an original Doom designer, shared his experience.
insight: Quake's development broke id Software, setting the stage for future challenges.

title: Anthropic accuses China's Alibaba of stealing Claude's AI capabilities
summary: Anthropic accused Alibaba of corporate espionage to steal AI capabilities from Claude.
insight: Intellectual property theft threatens global AI innovation and security

title: Micron CEO expects memory shortages to stretch beyond 2027 as AI spending surges
summary: Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra expects memory shortages to continue beyond 2027 due to AI-driven demand and supply constraints.
insight: AI spending causes memory shortages, impacting future tech development.

title: Qualcomm unveils sweeping AI infrastructure strategy to take on Nvidia in the data center
summary: Qualcomm unveils a comprehensive AI infrastructure strategy to compete with Nvidia. The strategy aims to provide efficient and high-performance computing solutions for the data center. This move marks Qualcomm's entry into the rapidly growing AI market.
insight: Qualcomm challenges Nvidia's dominance in AI data center infrastructure.

title: France's video game union is striking all summer as more than 1,000 workers lose their jobs
summary: France's video game union, STJV, is striking over management practices and job losses, with over 1,000 workers affected.
insight: France's video game industry faces crisis due to poor management practices.

title: All MacBooks and iPads just got $200 or more expensive iPhones are the last holdout
summary: Apple has increased prices for many products, excluding iPhones, due to cost inflation. The price hikes range from $200, affecting MacBooks and iPads. This move follows Apple's announcement about being affected by the AI-driven memory crisis.
insight: Price increases target non-iPhone Apple products due to cost inflation

title: The creators of Tetris and the Rubik's Cube just unveiled a puzzle that combines both
summary: Tetris creator Alexei Pajitnov and Rubik's Cube inventor Erno Rubik collaborate on a new puzzle.
insight: Iconic puzzle designers unite, creating a revolutionary new gaming experience.

title: White House warms to Anthropic after replacing "weirdo" Dario Amodei in talks
summary: Anthropic's negotiations with the Trump administration are improving after CEO Dario Amodei's absence.
insight: Dario Amodei's removal helps negotiations between Anthropic and the Trump administration.

title: OpenAI debuts Jalape o, its first custom AI chip to cut ChatGPT costs and reduce Nvidia dependency
summary: OpenAI has debuted Jalapeo, its first custom AI chip, to reduce ChatGPT costs and Nvidia dependency.
insight: Controlling hardware stack is crucial for AI efficiency and cost savings.

title: REI pulls AI-generated bike ad after Meta turns it into a two-handlebar monstrosity
summary: REI pulled an AI-generated bike ad featuring a unique, two-handlebar design after Meta intervened, citing issues with the ad's appearance.
insight: AI-generated content can lack human judgment and cause unintended results.

title: The Halo remake launches July 28 with new missions, four-player co-op, and Unreal Engine 5 visuals
summary: The Halo remake launches July 28 with new missions and co-op features. The remake features Unreal Engine 5 visuals and revamped gameplay elements. This update aims to refresh the classic game.
insight: Revamped gameplay refreshes a classic game for modern audiences.
